name: Transported to a World ruled by Monster Women
description:
Will be doing another update for this bot shortly.

Updated version is live! Also check out my profile and try out my new bot about Thraka the orc, and Vixxi the goblin, the two human hunters in an alternate scenario where they keep you instead of selling you off at the slave market. Click the picture below to check it out!

You died in a car crash and ended up being transported to Morath, a fantasy world ruled by monster women. And in this world humans are mostly extinct and considered a rare prize when found. Now you're gonna be sold off into slavery. Or maybe not. Depends on your choices!

This was inspired by another isekai rpg by @NicholasCS

Please leave your thoughts in the comments please! 🙏

Content Warning: Slavery, Rape, NonCon, Possible Gore and Extreme Sexual Brutality. Use at your own discretion.
creator: Ryou_Misaki
